|desc={{p|Wattrel}} is Iono's first known Pokémon. It was first used in Iono's Gym battle with {{Scarlet}}, where it fought the latter's {{p|Sprigatito}}. Despite the type advantage, Wattrel was quickly defeated when Sprigatito concealed itself with {{m|Leafage}} before striking with {{m|Seed Bomb}}.

None of Wattrel's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Bellibolt 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Iono
|pkmn=Bellibolt
|type1=Electric
|img=Iono Bellibolt Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV12
|epname=Stream! Iono Zone!!
|desc={{p|Bellibolt}} is Iono's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Armarouge}}. It tried attacking with a super effective {{m|Water Gun}}; Armarouge easily dodged with {{m|Substitute}} before taking Bellibolt out with {{m|Mystical Fire}}.

Bellibolt's only known move is {{m|Water Gun}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Iono
|pkmn=Mismagius
|type1=Ghost
|tera=Electric
|img=Iono Mismagius Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV12
|epname=Stream! Iono Zone!!
|desc={{p|Mismagius}} is Iono's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Pikachu}}. Despite Scarlet teaching her Pikachu a {{t|Ground}} move in advance to counter Iono's {{t|Electric}} types, Iono boasted that her Mismagius's {{a|Levitate}} Ability and {{Tera|Tera Type}} made it invincible. It managed to take down Scarlet's Armarouge and {{p|Floragato}} before losing to her Pikachu.

Mismagius's known moves are {{m|Phantom Force}} and {{m|Confuse Ray}}, and its Ability is {{a|Levitate}}{{tt|*|mentioned only}}.}}
